name: CZ75自动型 | 回转
descriptionEn: A fully automatic variant of the CZ75, the CZ75-Auto is the ideal short-term choice for turning the tables and gaining your opponents weapon. But with very little ammo in the magazine, strong trigger discipline is required. It has been custom painted with a multicolored abstract design. Black diamond gun
descriptionZh: 一把全自动的 CZ75 手枪变种，在扭转局势以及获取敌人武器时，CZ75 自动手枪是一个短期的理想选择。但弹夹中的弹药极少，你需要节约每一发子弹。 这款定制涂装采用了多色抽象设计。 黑色钻石枪
